seoTitle: Lol Gray vs Lort River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lol Gray and Lort River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lol Gray vs Lort River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lol Gray and Lort River.
heading: Lol Gray vs Lort River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lol Gray, Western Australia and Lort River, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lort River has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lol Gray (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lol Gray or Lort River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lol Gray has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Lort River scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lol Gray scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Lort River scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lol Gray or Lort River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lort River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
